policy: Only automatic_ready adapters may produce Tier A records. A renderer mode that changes precision, SH evaluation, tiling, or pruning has its own config_id.

renderers.name: Original 3DGS rasterizer
renderers.build: Clone the official repository at a pinned commit and run pip install . in submodules/diff-gaussian-rasterization.
renderers.gap: Pin the upstream commit in the environment lock.

renderers.name: gsplat packed/dense
renderers.build: pip install gsplat, or install the pinned source commit; apply the documented CUDA 13 patch only when required.
renderers.gap: Resolve the installed package to an immutable source commit, not only a package version.

renderers.name: gsplat HiGS variants
renderers.build: Install the pinned gsplat source commit containing the HiGS inference path.
renderers.runtime: In-process adapters: gsplat_higs, tile/SH variants, and gsplat_higs_auto
renderers.gap: Register each tile/SH mode as a distinct renderer config and pin the source commit.

renderers.name: Speedy-Splat
renderers.build: Clone the pinned repository and install its CUDA rasterizer extension in the active PyTorch environment.
renderers.gap: Add a reproducible build container for every supported CUDA architecture.

renderers.name: 3DGSTensorCore / TC-GS
renderers.build: Use docker/tcgs.Dockerfile or clone the pinned repository and build the Speedy-Splat integration for the target SM architecture.
renderers.gap: Make build flags and supported compute capabilities machine-readable.

renderers.name: fast-gaussian-rasterization
renderers.build: Clone the pinned repository and build its CUDA/OpenGL extension with EGL support.
renderers.output_format: OpenGL framebuffer copied to float32 HWC RGB
renderers.gap: CI/local hosts need a validated EGL context and framebuffer readback path.

renderers.name: FlashGS
renderers.build: Follow the pinned upstream CUDA extension build.
renderers.dataset_format: Upstream model format requires a lossless canonical PLY mapping
renderers.output_format: Must be adapted to float32 HWC RGB in [0,1]
renderers.gap: Implement scene conversion, camera mapping, output normalization, and quality tests.

renderers.name: Local-GS / TiCoGS
renderers.build: Follow the pinned upstream CUDA extension build.
renderers.output_format: Must be adapted to float32 HWC RGB in [0,1]
renderers.gap: Implement and validate the extension plus a same-checkpoint adapter.

renderers.name: GEMM-GS
renderers.build: Follow the pinned upstream CUDA extension build.
renderers.output_format: Must be adapted to float32 HWC RGB in [0,1]
renderers.gap: Implement adapter and establish supported precision/architecture policy.

renderers.name: StopThePop
renderers.dataset_format: May require retrained models; same-checkpoint path must be isolated
renderers.output_format: Must be adapted to float32 HWC RGB in [0,1]
renderers.gap: Define same-checkpoint and retrained-model tracks before integration.
